reviews.comment:
pésima la atención...me canse de esperar,eran 3 playeros y no mas de 10 vehiculos,ME FUI a 2 cuadras de ahi donde habia mas vehiculos y solo dos playeros y atendían como corresponde...entre y salí enseguida...NO VUELVO MAS

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible... I got tired of waiting. There were only three attendants and no more than ten vehicles. I went two blocks away to a station with more vehicles and only two attendants, and they were providing proper service. I went in and came right back out. I'm never going back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3cUxLUU5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención que hacía que se formarán largas filas.
Tendrían que mejorar los tiempos.
Está ubicada de forma tal que una vez realizada la operación es complicado retomar la calle en horarios de tránsito pico.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very slow, causing long lines. They need to improve the wait times. It's located in such a way that once the transaction is complete, it's difficult to get back on the street during peak traffic hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNiejc3c2hRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Alguna vez vieron una estación de servicio que cierre de noche? Yo por primera vez vi una... Encima del ACA... De terror. Los chicos atienden bien, pero que cierre me parece un montón.

(Translated by Google)
Have you ever seen a gas station that closes at night? I saw one for the first time... Right above the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina)... It's awful. The staff are good, but the fact that it closes seems excessive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6cDlHRTlnRRAB
